title: Generate Code in English
cap_description: Code generation and programming tasks in English
documentation:
## Purpose

Generates source code from a natural-language prompt using a locally running LLM. Supports specifying the target programming language, optional existing code context, style preferences, and whether to include unit tests and comments.

## Inputs

- A text prompt describing what code to write.
- Programming language (default: Rust).
- Optional code context (existing code or codebase description).
- Optional coding style or framework preferences.
- Max tokens (default 4096 — higher than other tasks to accommodate complete code).
- Flags for including unit tests and comments.
- A model spec (defaults to Mistral-7B-Instruct Q8_0).

## Outputs

A JSON record with the generated code, detected language, and metadata (token count, model used).

## Notes

- This cap uses constrained LLM generation to improve structural reliability of the output.
- Increase max tokens if the generated code is being truncated.
- For general text generation tasks, use [Summarize in English](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:constrained;in="media:textable";language=en;op=summarization;out="media:generated-text;textable;record") or the raw inference caps instead.

args.arg_description: Existing code context or codebase information
Model spec to use for code generation

output.output_description: Generated code with optional tests and documentation
